programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: (M) Older bachelor Michael falls for alluring psychic Janis, who sees him as an easy mark for a con. But Michael's concerned relative, Virginia, threatens to expose Janis's motives.
